CPV:
Highlights not available for Cabo Verde due to resource availability and relative political stability.

Please note, in April 2020, the Portuguese Government outlawed official party membership in politics, and the government claimed it was to ensure a level playing field for all and to focus on improving state capacity rather than party politics.

Current situation: (May 2021); The Federative Republic of Cabo Verde continues to work towards economic development and political stability while balancing relationships with various international actors.
